concept.domains: (topic concept) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c concept oceConcept-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
concept.title: 02 The function of the white ink circulation

abstract.p: The function of the white ink circulation is to prevent the pigment sedimentation in the tubes and print head due to the large pigment particle size.
Large pigment particles can result in print head and/or tube clogging on long term and inconsistent opacity of white ink in prints.
To enable ink recirculation a 3-way valve is added to the carriage unit.

entry.p: The Over pressure valve (Pressure relief valve).
When the pressure in the White ink lines is too high due to a malfunction or blockage, the valve will open and white ink will leak on to the leakage tray (6
(The stainless steel valve inside this relief valve is pushed down by a stainless steel spring set to open when there is an over pressure of 3.0 +- 0.3 bar)
Ink tank including the "over pressure valve" above and the "ink pump".
At the bottom of the image the "tank the leakage tray".

li.p: When the valve is not actuated ink is delivered to the white printhead
When the 3-way valve is actuated then ink is circulated back to the intermediate reservoir.

abstract.p: To limit the pressure within the tubes the pump speed during circulation is reduced to 40% of the nominal pump speed (<0.18 ml/s).
Actuation of the 3-way valve uses "hit and hold" voltage.
At actuation 24V is used for 50 ms and then it is reduced to 12 V.

The 3-way valve is actuated 100ms before the ink pump starts to prevent that ink flows to the printhead, and is dis-actuated 5 seconds after the pump stopped to allow the pressure in the ink tubes to fade away.

li.p: To prevent over-pressure in the tubes (due to e.g. clogged ink tubes) an overpressure valve of 3 bar is present just after the pump.
In case of overpressure the pressure (ink) is released in to the leak bin.
Whenever the maximum ink level in the printhead is detected there will be no white ink circulation.
Whenever the maximum level of ink is triggered during ink circulation then ink circulation is immediately stopped to prevent overfilling of the printhead.

When during using SDS test 2-6-010 Ink Recirculation the test fails with the message "print head overfilled" the level in the print head can be lowered with SDS test 07-6-002 "Clean the printheads (one pulse + wipe action)".
Circulation of ink is only started when the ink has sufficiently been stirred in the Bulk supply ( at least 120 seconds or 5 minutes when ink circulation was more than 24 hours ago).
Every 24 hour the white ink will be circulated in total for 10 minutes at moments the printer is idle. The minimum time is 30 seconds.
White ink circulation can be postponed to a maximum of 48 hours when ink circulation is not possible.
